title: Plainsman and the Lady
writer: Richard Wormser, Michael Uris, Ralph Spence
actors: Bill Elliott, Vera Ralston, Gail Patrick
plot: St. Joseph, Missouri, in 1859, is divided by a railroad track that separates the richer and poorer classes of people. From the richer side comes Ann Arnesen, daughter of Michael Arnesen, owner of the Pony Express. Michael hires Sa...
